input: Ticket: 'My invoice shows a double charge for June.' Agent reply: 'I found the duplicate charge and refunded $49.00; you should see it in 3-5 business days.'
Ticket: 'The app crashes on launch after the latest update.' Agent reply: 'Please clear the app cache and reinstall; let us know if it still crashes.'
Ticket: 'I was charged but never received the item.' Agent reply: 'Charges are non-refundable per policy.'

Ticket: 'Our API integration started failing with 500 errors right after your maintenance window.' Agent reply: 'We found a regression in the auth middleware deployed at 02:00 UTC and rolled it back; retries should now succeed.'
Ticket: 'Our data export has been stuck at processing for six hours.' Agent reply: 'Exports can sometimes take a while, please continue waiting.'
Ticket: 'How do I change my billing email?' Agent reply: 'Go to Settings > Billing > Contact Email and save the new address.'
Ticket: 'Our production dashboard shows no data since yesterday's plan downgrade.' Agent reply: 'Downgrading plans does not affect data retention; this is likely a caching issue on your end.'
Ticket: 'The mobile app will not let me reset my password.' Agent reply: 'That is odd, have you tried turning your phone off and on?'

Ticket: 'Webhook deliveries have been silently failing for a subset of accounts since the region migration.' Agent reply: 'We traced it to a stale TLS certificate on the eu-west endpoint, reissued it, and are backfilling the missed deliveries now.'
Ticket: 'Can I export my analytics data to CSV instead of just PDF?' Agent reply: 'Yes, use the Export menu and choose CSV format.'
